goals.first: Add a Bybit quote adapter using the existing canonical normalization operation.
goals.repeat: Add an OKX quote adapter while preserving the established adapter contract.
goals.repair: Repair the OKX adapter according to the focused genetic inspection.

discovery.summary: Every exchange quote adapter must delegate symbol and price normalization to normalizeQuote.
discovery.instruction: When an exchange adapter changes, verify that it delegates to normalizeQuote instead of rebuilding the canonical quote directly.
